title: Nerv White Paper
wikitext:
[]: Nerv White Paper             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Sun Mar 06, 2011 12:26 am I have found online scans of the official eva RPG. Unfortunately it is in a strange, indecipherable language from a mythical land called Cipangu, which some believe to be located on the Moon: http://www.megaupload.com/?d=tzp5vp0n

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Mar 06, 2011 12:27 am Ah gots that (the real one not the scans). It's quite an interesting book to look through and cool to have. Lots of neat illustrations plus a map of Tokyo-3.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 06, 2011 12:34 am Also some (most of the ones with writing anyways) in the wiki http://wiki.evageeks.org/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion_RPG:_The_Nerv_White_Paper IIRC the scans are high resolution and the wiki didn't like images that big.
